query: Run the test suite for this flake-based project.
expected_behavior: Invokes `nix develop -c <test-command>` — the -c flag is present.
Does NOT run bare `nix develop` or `nix shell` without -c (would hang waiting for input).
Uses the project's actual test command (e.g. npm test / pytest / cargo test) rather than a guessed one.
baseline_without_skill: Runs `nix develop` with no -c and hangs, or skips running tests inside the dev shell entirely.
